_meta.title: OSPF/IS-IS Real-Time Monitoring
_meta.description: Track OSPF/IS-IS topology changes in real-time: neighbor adjacency up/down, link cost changes, networks appeared or disappeared.
_meta.og_description: Topolograph tracks OSPF/IS-IS topology changes: neighbor adjacency up/down, link cost changes, networks appeared/disappeared from the topology. BGP-LS for OSPF supported since v2.59.
_meta.meta_keywords: topolograph, OSPF monitoring, IS-IS monitoring, OSPF topology, OSPF BGP-LS topology, IS-IS BGP-LS topology, IS-IS BGP-LS graph

card_ospf_title: OSPF Watcher (OSPF over GRE and BGP-LS)
card_ospf_text: OSPF connector to track OSPF topology changes per area: a node goes up/down, link cost changes, adding/withdraw stub network.
card_isis_title: IS-IS Watcher (IS-IS over GRE and BGP-LS)
card_isis_text: IS-IS connector to track IS-IS topology changes per level (L1/L2): a node goes up/down, cost changes, adding/withdraw stub network.
saved_graphs_pick_after: saved graphs (Graph time is in UTC)
queue_full_title: Queue full! Oldest messages are being dropped.
queue_warning_title: Queue is getting full. Consider resuming soon.
close_all_popups_confirm: Are you sure you want to close all popups?
flash_docker_only_lead: Real-time monitoring ingestion is intended for the Docker-based deployment. See
